pokemon:iron-jugulis.name: Iron Jugulis
pokemon:iron-jugulis.summary: It resembles a certain Pokémon introduced in a paranormal magazine, described as the offspring of a Hydreigon that fell in love with a robot.
expansionNotes: Competitive, encounter, and media coverage can be expanded later without changing the page contract.

pokedexEntries.text: It resembles a certain Pokémon introduced in a paranormal magazine, described as the offspring of a Hydreigon that fell in love with a robot.
It’s possible that Iron Jugulis, an object described in an old book, may actually be this Pokémon.

competitiveSummary: Competitive notes are pending a richer source import.
loreSummary: It resembles a certain Pokémon introduced in a paranormal magazine, described as the offspring of a Hydreigon that fell in love with a robot.

form:iron-jugulis.name: Iron Jugulis
form:iron-jugulis.summary: Iron Jugulis form with Dark / Flying typing.
